title: Water, gas & power outages - Pakistan's Karachi hit by utility collapse as Eid turns into crisis
summary_full: Karachi residents endured a grim Eid-ul-Adha marked by severe water, gas, and power outages. Families struggled to cook and preserve meat amid sweltering heat, leading to widespread protests. Despite official assurances, essential services failed, forcing many to resort to costly alternatives and endure immense hardship during the festival.
